purpose: Connect every reusable Video Studio quality gate to its code anchor, evidence surface, documentation, and tests without duplicating full gate rules.

updatePolicy.rule: Any added, renamed, or removed gate key must update this registry, docs/reference/gate-ontology.md, and tests/test_gate_ontology.py in the same change.
nonGoals: Do not copy complete gate rule prose from source modules.
Do not encode episode-specific or topic-specific rules.
Do not add a separate prose document for every low-level render-quality check.

phaseGates.requiredWhen: Before prompt or source generation for an episode.
Before prompt output, browser handoff, or episode artifact publication.
After a candidate fails or any production layer is changed for quality recovery.
Before render candidates can use selected visual sources.
After every render and before any final or upload readiness claim.
Before a final-library item is treated as ready for operator upload or goal completion.
After upload when platform analytics are claimed as improvement evidence.

finalReadinessGates.requiredWhen: A final MP4 artifact is claimed.
A final candidate claims source-generation or import quality.
A final candidate claims fresh source proof.
A candidate claims visible quality or upload readiness.
A candidate is described as ready to upload.
The production system itself is claimed to have met the broader operating goal.
finalReadinessGates.evidenceSchema: goalReadiness appended gate in final-library audit

sourceAcquisitionGates.requiredWhen: Grok or browser-handoff assets are matched for render/import.

sourceAcquisitionGates.evidenceSchema: mainSourceGate object in Grok render payload

sourceAcquisitionGates.requiredWhen: A Grok handoff render payload is requested.

sourceRightsGates.requiredWhen: An editorial source pilot plan is built.
A route attempts to fetch internet media into local storage.
Fetched editorial sources are promoted toward render binding.

activeProductionPacketLocks.requiredWhen: A render manifest declares formatProfile=longform_10m or reaches longform duration before FFmpeg.
activeProductionPacketLocks.evidenceSchema: production mode packet path/object evaluated by video-studio.production-mode-gate.v1

activeProductionPacketLocks.requiredWhen: A longform render manifest claims final or publish readiness before FFmpeg.
activeProductionPacketLocks.evidenceSchema: longform minimum release packet path/object evaluated by video-studio.longform-minimum-release-gate.v1

activeProductionPacketLocks.requiredWhen: An ACTIVE production packet pointer exists.
The ACTIVE pointer status determines whether the lock applies.
A render manifest may be bound to the active production packet scope.
The active pointer claims a production packet path.
The active production packet file must parse and identify a packet.
A render manifest matches the active packet scope.
A render manifest is bound to the active production packet.

formatProfileGates.requiredWhen: A production packet, source prompt bible, or render candidate declares a format.

providerRoleMatrixGates.requiredWhen: Before Grok/Gemini/browser-handoff prompts are generated or accepted.
providerRoleMatrixGates.evidenceSchema: providerRoleMatrix object in production packet or prompt bible

providerRoleMatrixGates.requiredWhen: Grok is assigned in a provider role matrix.
Gemini image output is assigned in a provider role matrix.
Gemini video output is assigned in a provider role matrix.

topicDiscoveryGates.requiredWhen: Before a topic candidate can enter storyboard, source prompt bible, source generation, or dry-run readiness.
topicDiscoveryGates.evidenceSchema: sourceLedger with fresh community, search/trend, platform, or reference observations

topicDiscoveryGates.requiredWhen: Before a selected topic can claim current Korean community/search/video discovery coverage.
topicDiscoveryGates.evidenceSchema: researchQueryPlan entries covering search, trend, video, and community surfaces with Korean query evidence for ko-KR

topicDiscoveryGates.requiredWhen: Before sourceLedger entries can be used as discovery proof.
topicDiscoveryGates.evidenceSchema: unique source IDs, non-placeholder URLs, and search/trend/video/community source-surface diversity

topicDiscoveryGates.requiredWhen: A selected topic claims Korean community or social-interest support.
topicDiscoveryGates.evidenceSchema: selected candidate communitySignals from at least two distinct community source IDs

topicDiscoveryGates.requiredWhen: A selected topic claims current timing, trend relevance, or audience-interest evidence.
topicDiscoveryGates.evidenceSchema: selected candidate trendEvidence with at least one official/search trend source

topicDiscoveryGates.requiredWhen: A selected topic claims it can become a curiosity, explainer, investigation, or decision-rule video.
topicDiscoveryGates.evidenceSchema: workingTitle, centralQuestion, knowledgeGap, whyNow, and viewerPromise fields

topicDiscoveryGates.requiredWhen: The selected topic is planned for longform_10m or another production format with evidence depth requirements.
topicDiscoveryGates.evidenceSchema: sourcePlan evidence depth plus longformPlan chapter, segment, and retention-hook counts

topicDiscoveryGates.requiredWhen: A selected topic claims it can become a longform_10m video or retention-sensitive shortform piece.
topicDiscoveryGates.evidenceSchema: longformPlan first30SecPromise, titleThumbnailExpectation, topMomentPreview, dipRiskMitigations, and chapterPromises

topicDiscoveryGates.requiredWhen: A selected topic comes from communities, social posts, news-adjacent chatter, or high-stakes domains.
topicDiscoveryGates.evidenceSchema: riskReview and originalityReview with fact-check, attribution, and transformative-angle fields

topicDiscoveryGates.requiredWhen: A production plan chooses one topic from a set of candidates.
topicDiscoveryGates.evidenceSchema: at least three candidates, computed score, top selected candidate, and rejection reasons for alternatives

longformProductionGates.evidenceSchema: chapter continuity plan or per-chapter bridges

longformProductionGates.requiredWhen: formatProfile is longform_10m and evidence/source items are used.
A longform candidate claims final readiness.

longformStoryboardGates.requiredWhen: formatProfile is longform_10m before source prompt generation.
formatProfile is longform_10m before source prompt generation.
formatProfile is longform_10m before source prompt generation.
formatProfile is longform_10m before source prompt generation.
formatProfile is longform_10m before source prompt generation.
longformStoryboardGates.evidenceSchema: storyboard beats bound to chapter evidence ids

longformStoryboardGates.requiredWhen: formatProfile is longform_10m before source prompt generation.
formatProfile is longform_10m before source prompt generation.

longformPowerUserGates.requiredWhen: formatProfile is longform_10m before source prompt generation.
formatProfile is longform_10m before source prompt generation.
formatProfile is longform_10m before source prompt generation and rough-cut planning.
formatProfile is longform_10m before source prompt generation and edit approval.
formatProfile is longform_10m before upload or derivative cutdown claims.
formatProfile is longform_10m when power-user production workflow claims are used.

longformWorkflowStageGates.requiredWhen: Before longform source generation, rough cut, render, final readiness, or derivative clip claims.
Any longform workflow stage is marked pass, active, blocked, or pending.
longformWorkflowStageGates.evidenceSchema: workflowStages entries with decisionRule/exitCriteria plus evidenceRefs and reviewerRole for passed stages

longformWorkflowStageGates.requiredWhen: A longform workflow stage attempts to advance or claim completion.
longformWorkflowStageGates.evidenceSchema: stage status map where later stages cannot pass or become active before prior stages pass

longformWorkflowStageGates.requiredWhen: A longform stage is blocked, failed, rejected, or a quality gate changes.
longformWorkflowStageGates.evidenceSchema: workflowImprovementLoop plus blocked-stage improvementActions with owner/mutation/verification

longformWorkflowStageGates.requiredWhen: A longform workflow gate packet claims that its order and verification structure are managed.
longformWorkflowStageGates.evidenceSchema: seededFailureSuite with passing cases for workflow order/evidence/dependency/improvement failures

longformMinimumReleaseGates.requiredWhen: A longform final candidate claims minimum publishable readiness.
longformMinimumReleaseGates.evidenceSchema: formatProfile, durationSec, chapters, and segments in video-studio.longform-minimum-release-gate.v1

longformMinimumReleaseGates.requiredWhen: A longform final candidate uses generated, sourced, or evidence media.
A longform final candidate depends on chaptered visual sources.
longformMinimumReleaseGates.evidenceSchema: sourceReviewImport continuity ratio, accepted chapter coverage, and unresolved source defect fields

longformMinimumReleaseGates.requiredWhen: A longform final candidate includes Korean narration, TTS, and captions.
longformMinimumReleaseGates.evidenceSchema: scriptTtsCaptionReview with language review, voice, WPM, caption/TTS sync, duplicate, and safe-zone fields

longformMinimumReleaseGates.requiredWhen: A longform final candidate claims directed edit quality.
longformMinimumReleaseGates.evidenceSchema: editorialReleaseReview with directed edit, motivated cuts, layout, source-bound cues, and baseline comparison

longformMinimumReleaseGates.requiredWhen: A longform final candidate claims usable sound design and BGM mix.
longformMinimumReleaseGates.evidenceSchema: audioReleaseReview with audio stream, ducking, beds, cue binding, peak, and mean loudness

longformMinimumReleaseGates.requiredWhen: A longform final candidate claims the full 10-minute piece was reviewed.
longformMinimumReleaseGates.evidenceSchema: fullWatchReview with completed timeline, reviewer, issue counts, density, chapter issue log, and retention review

longformMinimumReleaseGates.requiredWhen: A longform final candidate claims a numeric minimum release score.
longformMinimumReleaseGates.evidenceSchema: computed score from LONGFORM_MINIMUM_RELEASE_SCORE_WEIGHTS, with self-asserted score mismatch rejected

longformDryrunReadinessGates.requiredWhen: Before a longform packet enters source-generation, render, final, publish, or operator-visible E2E dry-run work.
Before a longform packet enters source-generation, render, final, publish, or operator-visible E2E dry-run work.
Before a longform dry-run can trust a source prompt bible, production packet, or render manifest.
Before any longform dry-run may start the render/E2E path.
Before a longform dry-run may claim final, upload, channel-ready, top-tier, or publish readiness.
Before a longform dry-run may accept final-library upload/channel/top-tier flags.
longformDryrunReadinessGates.evidenceSchema: finalLibraryAudit object with longformMinimumReleaseReady=true and status=pass

goldenReferenceOperationalChecks.evidenceSchema: manifest referenceStylePreset or golden/reference requirement flag

goldenReferenceOperationalChecks.requiredWhen: A manifest declares a reference style preset.
A reference/golden manifest is required to render.

symbols: manifest.scenes must be a non-empty list

goldenReferenceTopLevelGates.requiredWhen: A reference/golden candidate uses multiple source clips.
A reference/golden candidate uses generated or mixed source material.
A reference/golden candidate claims clean opening, voice, BGM, and payoff.
A reference/golden candidate claims final-quality edit direction.
